L1.head: conformational landscape of GPCRs
L1.claim: GPCRs的构象景观包含一个独特的瞬态中间状态

L1.head: distinct transient intermediate state
L1.claim: 该中间状态由特定脂质微域相互作用稳定

L1.head: distinct transient intermediate state
L1.claim: 该中间状态使信号偏向β-arrestin招募而非G蛋白激活

L2.head: distinct transient intermediate state
L2.claim: 中间状态调节下游功能机制

L2.head: distinct transient intermediate state
L2.claim: 该中间状态代表了一个独特的可药用构象

L2.head: unique druggable conformation
L2.claim: 该可药用构象允许开发稳定中间状态的配体

L2.head: ligands stabilizing the intermediate state
L2.tail: improved selectivity and efficacy with reduced side effects
L2.claim: 这些配体将表现出更好的选择性和疗效，减少副作用

L3.head: combining time-resolved FRET, cryo-EM, molecular dynamics simulations, and pharmacological profiling
L3.tail: map and characterize dynamic conformational shifts in GPCRs under varying lipid environments
L3.claim: 结合多种技术可以映射和表征不同脂质环境下的GPCR动态构象变化
